history.title: About Us
history.subtitle: Domestic Power in the Turkish Defense Industry
history.p1: AQUATIC Elektronik Makina Otomasyon Savunma Sanayi Tic. Ltd. Şti. is a high-tech engineering firm based in Kocaeli Gölcük, with a branch in Istanbul Technopark. With our well-equipped and experienced engineering team suitable for the defense industry infrastructure, we play leading roles in critical projects.
history.p2: We contribute to the production of domestic and national systems, primarily through our expertise in underwater technologies, MIL-STD product development, hardware engineering, and embedded software. We will continue to be your most reliable solution partner for innovative projects of the future.

timeline.2022: Participation in National Black Box project

visionMission.title: Vision & Mission
visionMission.subtitle: Technologies Shaping the Future
visionMission.desc: We aim to become a global player by increasing domestic production capacity in underwater and defense industries.
visionMission.visionText: To become a global brand offering completely domestic and national solutions in underwater and defense technologies. By placing innovation at the center, we aim to reach the position of the leading manufacturer of critical systems contributing to our country's technological independence.
visionMission.missionText: To create value in national and international projects by providing the most suitable, high-quality, and reliable engineering solutions for our clients' needs.

values.title: Quality Values
values.subtitle: Uncompromising Values
values.innovationDesc: We follow the latest technologies in the industry through continuous research and development.
values.reliabilityDesc: We ensure on-time delivery and quality assurance in our projects.
values.expertiseDesc: We provide professional solutions with our team of specialized engineers.
values.sustainabilityDesc: We adopt environmentally conscious and sustainable production processes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common Inquiries
faq.desc: We have compiled the most frequently asked questions regarding our services, working model, and after-sales support.

1.question: Which sectors do you serve?
1.answer: We provide engineering solutions across various sectors, primarily in defense, electronics & automation, machinery, and maritime.

2.question: What is your working model for projects?
2.answer: First, we analyze the requirements, then complete the feasibility and design phases before moving on to prototype, testing, and mass production steps. We keep our clients regularly informed throughout the entire process.

3.question: Do you offer service/maintenance for your products and systems?
3.answer: Yes. We provide post-installation warranty support, periodic maintenance, and on-site service when necessary.

4.question: Do you also work on international projects?
4.answer: Yes, we participate in international projects within the scope of appropriate licenses and regulations.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: High-performance underwater technologies designed for critical missions

camera.title: Underwater Camera
camera.desc: Pressure-resistant industrial camera systems providing high-resolution imaging in harsh underwater conditions.

light.title: Underwater Lighting
light.desc: High-lumen and energy-efficient LED lighting units specifically designed for deep-sea operations.

monitor.title: Operator Monitor
monitor.desc: Sunlight-readable, water and dust-resistant industrial displays designed for ROV control stations.

harness.title: Harness & Cabling
harness.desc: High-reliability, pressure and corrosion-resistant special cable assemblies for underwater systems.

portableUnit.title: Portable Control Unit

pressureVessel.title: Pressure Vessels
pressureVessel.desc: Special alloy sealed pressure vessels protecting submarine and ROV electronics from depth pressure.

hero.title: National Black Box
hero.subtitle: High-durability data recording system for Turkey's aviation and submarine platforms.

blackbox.title: National Black Box
blackbox.subtitle: Turkey's First Domestic and National Black Box
blackbox.description: Aquatic contributes to Turkey's defense industry independence goals by participating in the country's first domestic and national black box project. This critical technology is designed to withstand the most extreme conditions.
